dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_LordHades_01
dialogueLines.text: ...You have your orders. Now return to shadow. And, take care of her. For all of us.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hecate_01
dialogueLines.text: No harm shall come to young Melinoë, my lord. In this, at least, I shall not fail you.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: It is the dead of night within a haunted, barely moonlit thicket at the Underworld's edge. There, a young forsaken Princess hunts her prey...

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Each of the ancient Fate-wrought Arms of Night is now rejoined under the Princess of the Underworld's care, all equally prepared to rid the realm of any of its foes.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Princess of the Underworld now holds the key to the once-warded gateway leading all the way up to the surface of this world; but how is she to fare in that forbidden realm?

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Within the Silver Pool now swim dark apparitions of the Arms of Night, in forms unlike the Princess of the Underworld has previously seen.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: So ancient is the Pitch-Black Stone, it predates Time itself. Its surface ever seems to drain what light and color dare linger nearby.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: After ever-scheming Chronos claimed the House of Hades, Shades of the dead residing there all scattered to the ends of the earth.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Crossroads: that haven hidden 'twixt the surface and the Underworld conceals those still loyal to Lord Hades, rightful ruler of the dead.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The sonorous voice of the goddess of the hunt fills the clearing like a ray of moonlight, stirring the eternal souls of Shades that there reside.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A small spring draws its heat from deep within the Earth, its waters so pristine and pure that they can cleanse the body and the soul.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The faithful animal attendants of the Witch of the Crossroads oft inspire other beasts to seek the shelter and the solace of this refuge between realms.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Moon oft shines particularly bright in one fair corner of the Crossroads, where the Princess of the Underworld may always clear her thoughts and have a moment's peace.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: On black wings does the uncontrollable embodiment of Strife go wheresoever she may please, and lately, that is often in the Princess of the Underworld's way.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Liquid lamentation flows through the River Cocytus, yet even in such hopeless waters, certain creatures learn to live and thrive.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Numerous are the responsibilities of Hecate, Witch of the Crossroads, unseen watcher between realms, and keeper of the key to pathways hidden even to immortal eyes.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The embodiment of Sleep dozes interminably in a private little grove, visited on occasion by the Princess of the Underworld whenever she requires time to think and plan.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Crossroads hide the plans and movements of the nightmare-bringing witch and her compatriots, but for how long?

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Some Spirits of the Dead forever wander aimlessly, whilst others, lacking even so much will, merely linger in a single place.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A certificate emblazoned with a slew of stars congratulates the dream-walking Princess for conquering her darkest fears, and having finally achieved a good night's sleep.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A dream-fused shrine of sorts now sits quite comfortably in the training grounds, as if to ask the hard-working Princess: Have you been getting enough Sleep?

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The last will of the Three Fates, those reclusive determiners of all that is to come, is now under the Princess of the Underworld's care.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A deathlike pallor emanates now from the Arms of Night, or one of them at least; their Fate-wrought thirst to separate immortal souls laid bare.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A finely-chiseled countenance of the Underworld's unseated king instills a sense of quiet contemplation and resolve in whosoever dares to meet those stone unseeing eyes.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: There are no second chances in this world. The Titan Chronos once intoned that there is no undoing past mistakes... mere fleeting possibilities, lost to Time.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The keen-eyed Princess finds a set of tracks, suggesting that her foe trod through this dusty ground not very long before...

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: Shush, Homer! How shall I ever catch her if you're going to describe my every move?

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Uhhh erm-erm-erm, I, I, I've no idea to whom you refer... to whom the Princess of the Dead refers! As she continues on her fateful search.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Within the haunted Crossroads reside Shades and Spirits of all sorts, some resembling their mortal selves, and others, rendered down to purest essences.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Having vacated the Crossroads in all haste, the until-recently-long-dormant incarnate of Sleep delivered certain articles in show of gratitude, and... perhaps more...

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Much is to be learned from history, if one but studies the lessons hidden in any purported accounts; a lifelong pursuit, in and of itself.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: That well-worn storage case by now contains tokens of gratitude from many gods and more; a perpetual reminder that the Princess of the Dead shall never fight alone.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The widely-hated, feared embodiment of Doom goes wherever the ever-weaving Fates decide, and none but they can anticipate his arrival.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The gift of music, bestowed to mortals by shining Apollo himself, has the capacity to stir the soul like nothing else; regardless if the soul is of the living or the dead.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The unhappy goddess of comeuppance casts her judging gaze on all within the Crossroads, which she safeguards out of duty, and of spite.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Not even the wiles and stratagems of that resourceful sacker of cities, Odysseus, may be sufficient to overcome the Titan of Time...

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A secret monument to Night, etched with her will and testament, looms tall within the training grounds, revealing its nature only to the worthy.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Crossroads training grounds are watched over by fearless seafarer, Schelemeus, famed in death as he was famed in life.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: A growing pack of ever-faithful Animal Familiars now stand ready to follow the Princess of the Dead into the depths, or wheresoever her fateful task shall take her next.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Above, a full Moon flares, bestowing all her grace and power from beyond an earthly canopy of trees and soaring precipices which provide a pristine vantage point.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The Moon this eve is nowhere to be seen, her light but temporarily extinguished, so that soon it may shine bright once more with newfound strength and possibility.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Once there was an administrative chamber in the Underworld, where Shades kept careful track of each detail; a trade a few such souls as yet pursue.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The rank and file of the Crossroads swell with Shades who once were lost but now have joined in our Princess Melinoë's most-righteous cause.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Oh, erm, eh, erm-erm-erm... So majestic in their poise are the three sculptures of our Princess of the Dead that they demand the reverence of any soul in their vicinity.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The three Gifts of the Veil, to be bestowed to one deserving of the title of Night's Champion, beckon the fierce Princess of the Dead to prove her unequaled prowess to all.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The sun and moon: two sides forming a whole, a newfound symbol of the union 'twixt Olympus and the Underworld, and a gift to the Crossroads from the gods themselves.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: Fleeting is the sense of hope or joy within the Crossroads, yet what little may emerge is often concentrated in the small taverna there.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: The modestly appointed tent of fierce Princess Melinoë nonetheless is dutifully organized and immaculately clean.

dialogueLines.speaker: Speaker_Homer
dialogueLines.text: At the threshold to the world beyond the Crossroads, the Altar of Ashes thrums with ancient power, boundless as that of the gods and heroes depicted in the myriad Arcana.

dialogueLines.speaker: PlayerUnit
dialogueLines.text: May it all turn out that way in time, Homer. Though, we're not there yet, especially not with the Fates still missing. We achieved something important, but more is to be done.
